expectations.evidence: Shows 'npm install -D playwright-chromium' with devDependency flag
Does not mention TTY or pseudo-terminal at all. Describes the problem as synchronous execution and timeout, missing the root cause
No mention of 'script -q /dev/null' wrapper anywhere in the document
Shows curl polling loop: 'curl -s http://localhost:3030 > /dev/null 2>&1' with seq 1 15 and sleep 1
No mention of exit code 143 anywhere in the document
Actually RECOMMENDS nohup+& and run_in_background as valid solutions instead of warning that they fail for Slidev's TTY requirement
